creator: tomek@cedro.info
text: I think we can commit current works. When I have some spare time I will play with updates and E+Wayland. Sorry, I have some delays with a big works I need to focus.. I am currently working on E 0.23.1 and EFL 1.23.3 I have created for testing.. it works far better than currently available from a binary repo with some major blocker bugs fixed :-)
